title: anthoxanthum nitens var. glabrum
intro: Anthoxanthum nitens var. glabrum, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of sweet vernal grass include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of sweet vernal grass can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
